name: Salesforce Sales Cloud
highlight_text: Category: Enterprise CRM for Large Agencies
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Salesforce Does

Salesforce Sales Cloud is an enterprise-grade CRM known for its vast customization and integration capabilities. It’s designed for large agencies managing multiple teams, territories, or complex deal structures.

Source: Salesforce

Key Features

🏆Centralize emails, calls, meetings, and tasks; qualify and prioritize leads; manage accounts and opportunities through every stage.

🏆Create forecasts, track quotas, and gain real‑time visibility into the pipeline.

🏆Build customized dashboards and drill into data with real‑time analytics.

🏆Design complex approval workflows and automate repetitive tasks across departments.

Benefits

  • Highly Scalable: Ideal for agencies managing multiple service lines.
  • Data-Driven Decisions: Einstein AI enhances forecasting accuracy.
  • Strong Ecosystem: Integrates with nearly every major business tool.

Pricing

  • Starter: US $25 per user/month
  • Pro: US $100 per user/month
  • Enterprise: US $175 per user/month
  • Unlimited & Agentforce: US $350–$550 per user/month

Pros

✅ Industry leader in CRM technology

✅ Unmatched customization and reporting

✅ Extensive third-party integrations

Cons

🚫 High implementation cost

🚫 Requires technical expertise for setup and maintenance

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“Salesforce Sales Cloud has a huge range of features that make managing leads and tracking sales so much easier… The biggest downside is definitely the complexity.”

– Ameer A.
